name: agentic-qa-orchestrator
description: Benchmark-first hybrid lab for local Stagehand QA, exploration, diagnosis, and self-healing.

scripts.guided: corepack pnpm --filter @agentic-qa/harness-core build && tsx packages/harness-cli/src/index.ts guided
scripts.explore: corepack pnpm --filter @agentic-qa/harness-core build && tsx packages/harness-cli/src/index.ts explore
scripts.heal: corepack pnpm --filter @agentic-qa/harness-core build && tsx packages/harness-cli/src/index.ts heal
scripts.fullbench: corepack pnpm --filter @agentic-qa/harness-core build && tsx packages/harness-cli/src/index.ts fullbench
scripts.report: corepack pnpm --filter @agentic-qa/harness-core build && tsx packages/harness-cli/src/index.ts report
